## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance: Impressions increased significantly, with clicks stabilizing at a higher level (10-15 range).](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Strategy shift: Consolidating ETL/ELT articles into pillar content to avoid self-competition and improve SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Metrics: 50%+ engaged sessions (1min+ or further exploration) indicate strong content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Repositioning: Shifting focus to DEC and non-technical users, impacting JTBD article approach.](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)

## Topics

### Content Delivery and Publication Update

  - [3 articles delivered for review; 1 pending (Shadow ID)](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [5 articles published last week](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [New article outline on "Original Pipeline Designed for BAs" posted in Airtable (includes webinar quotes)](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)

### Analytics Tracking Challenges

  - [GA4 event definitions: Follow-up needed with Evan (out of office)](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Qualified/HubSpot integration limitations:](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
      - [Content attribution tied to first email capture in a session](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [Pre-email content consumption not attributed](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Matt raised concerns about missing data, citing previous funding announcement stats](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Content Performance

  - [Impressions increased significantly](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Clicks stabilized at 10-15 range (down from 15, but higher than previous baseline)](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Standout articles:](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
      - [Data governance article jumped from 30s to top 10](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
      - [Data engineering skills article performing well](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [New ETL article showing promise](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustments

  - [ETL/ELT articles competing against each other](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Plan to consolidate:](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
      - [2 ETL articles into one comprehensive pillar content](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
      - [1 ELT article to become pillar post (Anya's byline)](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [New focus: "Enhancing ETL" deep-dive article](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [3 articles marked for refresh in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

### Referral Traffic and Engagement

  - [Referral traffic stable week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [50%+ engaged sessions (1min+ or further site exploration)](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Strong indicator of content quality, especially for top-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

      - [Data silos article showing promise](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)

### Repositioning Strategy

  - [Shift focus to DEC and non-technical users](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [Will impact JTBD articles approach and overall narrative](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [Core topics to remain consistent](https://fathom.video/share/ySeeymRXjh6d3SAHh-DAcAqy7a3-6RZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
